title: [InstCombine] Fold (A ^ (X & ~C)) ^ C to (X | C) ^ A
author: ZY546
description:
Add a fold for:

  (A ^ (X & ~C)) ^ C
    -> (X | C) ^ A

where C is a constant.

Proof: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/JH3qpT
Fixed: #195019

tests.test_body:
define i32 @and_extra_use(i32 %a, i32 %x, ptr %p) {
  %and = and i32 %x, -43
  store i32 %and, ptr %p, align 4
  %xor0 = xor i32 %a, %and
  %r = xor i32 %xor0, 42
  ret i32 %r
}

define i32 @inner_xor_extra_use(i32 %a, i32 %x, ptr %p) {
  %and = and i32 %x, -43
  %xor0 = xor i32 %a, %and
  store i32 %xor0, ptr %p, align 4
  %r = xor i32 %xor0, 42
  ret i32 %r
}

comments.author: llvmorg-github-actions[bot]
comments.body:
<!--LLVM PR SUMMARY COMMENT-->

@llvm/pr-subscribers-llvm-transforms

Author: yiiiz (ZY546)

<details>
<summary>Changes</summary>

Add a fold for:

  (A ^ (X & ~C)) ^ C
    -> (X | C) ^ A

where C is a constant.

Proof: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/JH3qpT
Fixed: #<!-- -->195019

---
Full diff: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/195264.diff


2 Files Affected:

- (modified) llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineAndOrXor.cpp (+9) 
- (added) llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/xor-and-not-const.ll (+119) 


``````````diff
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineAndOrXor.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineAndOrXor.cpp
index d81ed56290476..67fc6d66ef054 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineAndOrXor.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineAndOrXor.cpp
@@ -5571,6 +5571,15 @@ Instruction *InstCombinerImpl::visitXor(BinaryOperator &I) {
       match(Op1, m_Not(m_Specific(A))))
     return BinaryOperator::CreateNot(Builder.CreateAnd(A, B));
 
+  // (A ^ (X & ~C)) ^ C --> (X | C) ^ A
+  Constant *NotC;
+  if (match(&I, m_c_Xor(m_OneUse(m_c_Xor(
+                            m_Value(A), m_OneUse(m_c_And(
+                                            m_Value(X), m_ImmConstant(NotC))))),
+                        m_ImmConstant(C1))) &&
+      NotC == ConstantExpr::getNot(C1))
+    return BinaryOperator::CreateXor(Builder.CreateOr(X, C1), A);
+
   // (~A & B) ^ A --> A | B -- There are 4 commuted variants.
   if (match(&I, m_c_Xor(m_c_And(m_Not(m_Value(A)), m_Value(B)), m_Deferred(A))))
     return BinaryOperator::CreateOr(A, B);
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/xor-and-not-const.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/xor-and-not-const.ll
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000..b2a439b1b0b89
--- /dev/null
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/xor-and-not-const.ll
@@ -0,0 +1,119 @@
+; NOTE: Assertions have been autogenerated by utils/update_test_checks.py
+; RUN: opt < %s -passes=instcombine -S | FileCheck %s
+
+; (A ^ (X & ~C)) ^ C --> (X | C) ^ A
+
+define i32 @basic(i32 %a, i32 %x) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: @basic(
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = or i32 [[X:%.*]], 42
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = xor i32 [[TMP1]], [[A:%.*]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[R]]
+;
+  %and = and i32 %x, -43
+  %xor0 = xor i32 %a, %and
+  %r = xor i32 %xor0, 42
+  ret i32 %r
+}
+
+define i32 @outer_xor_commuted(i32 %a, i32 %x) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: @outer_xor_commuted(
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = or i32 [[X:%.*]], 42
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = xor i32 [[TMP1]], [[A:%.*]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[R]]
+;
+  %and = and i32 %x, -43
+  %xor0 = xor i32 %a, %and
+  %r = xor i32 42, %xor0
+  ret i32 %r
+}
+
+define i32 @inner_xor_commuted(i32 %a, i32 %x) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: @inner_xor_commuted(
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = or i32 [[X:%.*]], 42
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = xor i32 [[TMP1]], [[A:%.*]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[R]]
+;
+  %and = and i32 %x, -43
+  %xor0 = xor i32 %and, %a
+  %r = xor i32 %xor0, 42
+  ret i32 %r
+}
+
+define i32 @and_commuted(i32 %a, i32 %x) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: @and_commuted(
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = or i32 [[X:%.*]], 42
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = xor i32 [[TMP1]], [[A:%.*]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[R]]
+;
+  %and = and i32 -43, %x
+  %xor0 = xor i32 %a, %and
+  %r = xor i32 %xor0, 42
+  ret i32 %r
+}
+
+define <2 x i8> @vector_splat(<2 x i8> %a, <2 x i8> %x) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: @vector_splat(
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = or <2 x i8> [[X:%.*]], splat (i8 42)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = xor <2 x i8> [[TMP1]], [[A:%.*]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i8> [[R]]
+;
+  %and = and <2 x i8> %x, <i8 -43, i8 -43>
+  %xor0 = xor <2 x i8> %a, %and
+  %r = xor <2 x i8> %xor0, <i8 42, i8 42>
+  ret <2 x i8> %r
+}
+
+define <2 x i8> @vector_non_splat(<2 x i8> %a, <2 x i8> %x) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: @vector_non_splat(
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = or <2 x i8> [[X:%.*]], <i8 42, i8 12>
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = xor <2 x i8> [[TMP1]], [[A:%.*]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i8> [[R]]
+;
+  %and = and <2 x i8> %x, <i8 -43, i8 -13>
+  %xor0 = xor <2 x i8> %a, %and
+  %r = xor <2 x i8> %xor0, <i8 42, i8 12>
+  ret <2 x i8> %r
+}
+
+define i32 @mismatched_const(i32 %a, i32 %x) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: @mismatched_const(
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = and i32 [[X:%.*]], -44
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[XOR0:%.*]] = xor i32 [[A:%.*]], [[AND]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = xor i32 [[XOR0]], 42
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[R]]
+;
+  %and = and i32 %x, -44
+  %xor0 = xor i32 %a, %and
+  %r = xor i32 %xor0, 42
+  ret i32 %r
+}
+
+define i32 @and_extra_use(i32 %a, i32 %x, ptr %p) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: @and_extra_use(
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = and i32 [[X:%.*]], -43
+; CHECK-NEXT:    store i32 [[AND]], ptr [[P:%.*]], align 4
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[XOR0:%.*]] = xor i32 [[A:%.*]], [[AND]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = xor i32 [[XOR0]], 42
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[R]]
+;
+  %and = and i32 %x, -43
+  store i32 %and, ptr %p
+  %xor0 = xor i32 %a, %and
+  %r = xor i32 %xor0, 42
+  ret i32 %r
+}
+
+define i32 @inner_xor_extra_use(i32 %a, i32 %x, ptr %p) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: @inner_xor_extra_use(
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = and i32 [[X:%.*]], -43
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[XOR0:%.*]] = xor i32 [[A:%.*]], [[AND]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    store i32 [[XOR0]], ptr [[P:%.*]], align 4
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = xor i32 [[XOR0]], 42
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[R]]
+;
+  %and = and i32 %x, -43
+  %xor0 = xor i32 %a, %and
+  store i32 %xor0, ptr %p
+  %r = xor i32 %xor0, 42
+  ret i32 %r
+}

``````````

</details>
